title: Field Viewer (Matplotlib)
description: A field coloured on the mesh, via `zoomy_plotting.MatplotlibPlotter`. Unified 1D/2D/3D. Pick the field, scrub the timeline. A clean starting point — duplicate and edit to build your own view.

title: Mesh Wireframe
description: Cell edges over a faint field — a quick resolution check (`show_mesh=True`).

title: Probe Time Series
description: A field at one probe cell over time, via `zoomy_plotting.line_plot`. Edit `cell` to move the probe.

title: Empty Figure
template:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(6, 4))
ax.set_title('Empty View')
description: Empty matplotlib canvas for custom plots.

title: Mesh Viewer (Plotly)
description: Unified 1D/2D/3D interactive mesh visualization using Plotly. Rotate, pan, zoom with mouse. Edit `field_name` and `colormap`, use the timeline slider for snapshots.

title: Sine Wave (demo)
description: Standalone interactive plotly demo (no simulation data needed).
